prose: **Furan Fukui reactivity indices** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz`, single-point (no relaxation). Mulliken partial charges (PySCF) were used for neutral (N), cationic (N – 1), and anionic (N + 1) states to compute Fukui functions. SCF converged for all three states. Warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge), sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge), common header present. The most electrophilic site is C 5 with f⁺ = 1.9242931; the most nucleophilic site is also C 5 with f⁻ = 0.1616371 (dual descriptor at C 5 = 1.762656).
